periods.name: Sunday
periods.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely between 1pm and 4pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 71. South wind 20 to 26 mph, with gusts as high as 43 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Snow Showers
